title: Security: OOB in vb2ops_venc_queue_setup
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
This vulnerability has been fixed in the vb2ops_vdec_queue_setup function, but not in vb2ops_venc_queue_setup.  
  
variable \*nplanes is provided by user via system call argument. The  
possible value of q_data->fmt->num_planes is 1-3, while the value
